message.content:
@startuml
participant as "任务开始" as Actor

participant "GuideTaskStartListener" as Listener
participant "GuideTaskStartProcessor" as Processor
participant "GuideTaskStartDomainService" as DomainService
participant "GuideTaskStartStrategy" as Strategy
participant "ShoppingGuideReadApi" as ShoppingApi
participant "GuideTaskRepository" as Repository
participant "GuideTaskDataRepository" as DataRepository

Actor "任务开始" as Actor
Actor "nsq 消息" as Message

Message "1 监听任务开始消息" as Msg1
Msg1 -> Listener : 监听任务开始消息

Message "2 开始处理" as Msg2
Msg2 -> Processor : 开始处理

Message "3 查询任务" as Msg3
Msg3 -> DomainService : 查询任务

Message "4 开始任务" as Msg4
Msg4 -> DomainService : 开始任务

Message "5 构建任务" as Msg5
Msg5 -> Strategy : 构建任务

Message "6 根据部门查询导购" as Msg6
Msg6 -> ShoppingApi : 根据部门查询导购

Message "7 根据导购进行任务分配" as Msg7
Msg7 -> Strategy : 根据导购进行任务分配

Rectangle "Transaction" as Txn

Message "8 保存分配给导购的任务" as Msg8
Msg8 -> Strategy : 保存分配给导购的任务

Message "9 status flow 任务状态流转至 已启动" as Msg9
Msg9 -> Strategy : status flow 任务状态流转至 已启动

Message "10 任务流转为执行中" as Msg10
Msg10 -> Strategy : 任务流转为执行中

@enduml
